title: sensitive_data_report

excerpt.description: Truncated excerpt (max 40 chars) to identify the location without reproducing the secret.

severity.description: Blocking halts the pipeline; warning is surfaced but does not halt in quick_clean mode.

sensitive_findings.description: List of sensitive content findings. Empty array when nothing detected.

sensitive_blocking.description: True when at least one finding has severity 'blocking'. Pipeline must halt.

x-hard_rules: sensitive_blocking must be true if and only if at least one finding has severity 'blocking'
full secret values must never appear in excerpt
this report must be produced before StructureExtractor runs
sensitive_blocking: true halts the pipeline regardless of mode
